releases.name: v1.0.4. Fix soure-code warnings and update depencencies Latest (techincal re-release)

releases.author: Lavton
releases.description:
list of fixed problems

## Source code

- **Warning**: "builtin-modules" should be replaced with an alternative package. Read more here: https://github.com/es-tooling/module-replacements/blob/main/docs/modules/builtin-modules.md
  - package.json:19
- **Warning**: Use 'createDiv()' instead of 'document.createElement('div')'.
  - src/notifiing.ts:7, src/notifiing.ts:24, src/settings/explain.ts:6
- **Warning**: Use 'activeDocument' instead of 'document' for popout window compatibility.
  - src/notifiing.ts:7, src/notifiing.ts:16, src/notifiing.ts:24, src/notifiing.ts:36, src/settings/explain.ts:5, src/settings/explain.ts:6
- **Warning**: 'component' is assigned a value but never used. Allowed unused vars must match /^_/u.
  - src/notifiing.ts:9, src/notifiing.ts:26, src/settings/explain.ts:8
- **Warning**: Use 'createFragment()' instead of 'document.createDocumentFragment()'.
  - src/notifiing.ts:16, src/notifiing.ts:36, src/settings/explain.ts:5
- **Warning**: 'settingsComponent' is assigned a value but never used. Allowed unused vars must match /^_/u.
  - src/settings/settingsObs.ts:40
- **Warning**: Prefer using the primitive `string` as a type name, rather than the upper-cased `String`.
  - src/settings/settingsObs.ts:48, src/utils.ts:31


## Dependencies

- **Warning**: Potentially vulnerable dependency js-yaml (via @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin). Verify that this vulnerability does not affect your plugin.
  - Upgrade to version 4.1.1 or later https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mh29-5h37-fv8m
- **Warning**: Potentially vulnerable dependency svelte. Verify that this vulnerability does not affect your plugin.
  - Upgrade to version 5.51.5 or later https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-crpf-4hrx-3jrp
- **Warning**: Potentially vulnerable dependency svelte. Verify that this vulnerability does not affect your plugin.
  - Upgrade to version 5.51.5 or later https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m56q-vw4c-c2cp
- **Warning**: Potentially vulnerable dependency svelte. Verify that this vulnerability does not affect your plugin.
  - Upgrade to version 5.51.5 or later https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f7gr-6p89-r883
- **Warning**: Potentially vulnerable dependency minimatch (via @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin). Verify that this vulnerability does not affect your plugin.
  - Upgrade to version 3.1.3 or later https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3ppc-4f35-3m26
- **Warning**: Potentially vulnerable dependency minimatch (via @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin). Verify that this vulnerability does not affect your plugin.
  - Upgrade to version 3.1.3 or later https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7r86-cg39-jmmj
- **Warning**: Potentially vulnerable dependency minimatch (via @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin). Verify that this vulnerability does not affect your plugin.
  - Upgrade to version 3.1.4 or later https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-23c5-xmqv-rm74
- **Warning**: Potentially vulnerable dependency ajv (via @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin). Verify that this vulnerability does not affect your plugin.
  - Upgrade to version 6.14.0 or later https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2g4f-4pwh-qvx6
- **Warning**: Potentially vulnerable dependency svelte. Verify that this vulnerability does not affect your plugin.
  - Upgrade to version 5.53.5 or later https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-phwv-c562-gvmh
- **Warning**: Potentially vulnerable dependency flatted (via @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin). Verify that this vulnerability does not affect your plugin.
  - Upgrade to version 3.4.0 or later https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-25h7-pfq9-p65f
- **Warning**: Potentially vulnerable dependency flatted (via @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin). Verify that this vulnerability does not affect your plugin.

- **Warning**: Potentially vulnerable dependency brace-expansion (via @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin). Verify that this vulnerability does not affect your plugin.
